title: Share docs outside of monday
excerpt: Hello, I’m looking for a way to share some of my monday docs with clients outside of the monday platform. This could be from within monday, or with an app.

posts.author: Blumablum (Bluma)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, I’m looking for a way to share some of my monday docs with clients outside of the monday platform. This could be from within monday, or with an app.

posts.author: Harsh (farioconsulting.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Blumablum

You could create a read only public link of your Monday workdocs and share the same with your clients

posts.author: saggi (Saggi Neumann)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Bluma,

Depending on your Monday plan, you may be able to share a single doc by opening the doc, clicking the share button, and then switching “Share doc publicly” to on.

If you’d like to share more than just the one doc as a full fledged website, you may want to check out Sundae, our app that turns monday docs to websites, for documentation, wikis, help centers, customer reports, landing pages and even blogs, all from the comfort of your monday workspace.

image1920×1001 141 KB

The site is responsive (i.e. works well with mobile devices too), supports dark mode/light mode, SEO optimizations and can also be attached to your own domain. There’s even a free plan that you can try.

Check out our docs and blog (yes, created with Sundae for Monday ;)):

docs.sundae.so

Sundae Docs

Learn how to transform your monday docs into full fledged help centers, wikis, blogs and more

blog.sundae.so

Sundae - Bring your monday.com docs to life

Build a website in less than a minute using Sundae for Monday. Keep all your content on monday.com, while Sundae takes care of everything else!

posts.author: Blumablum (Bluma)
posts.cookedHtml: Looks great, thank you! I’ll give it a go.

posts.author: Lauraann (Laura-ann Burgess)
posts.cookedHtml: I dare say, that sounds insanely useful!!!

posts.author: Milana (Milana Tsyhanenko)
posts.cookedHtml: very nice, thank you for this product
